description.ko: 블랙홀의 정적과 소용돌이치는 성운을 통해 무한한 우주의 장엄함을 표현합니다.
description.en: The majesty of the infinite cosmos represented by the silent power of a black hole and swirling nebulae.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-high-definition shot of VOID-3, depicting a massive gravitational singularity. A central black hole is surrounded by a swirling accretion disk of #3D1A78 deep violet and #7B68EE indigo energy. Faint #E6E6FA lavender nebula clouds drift through the infinite #0D0221 obsidian abyss. Light from distant stars is stretched by gravitational lensing. Ethereal, cold, and vast atmosphere, 8k resolution, photorealistic cosmic dust, volumetric lighting.
